name: Believe Global Group
description: Believe Global Group builds brand intelligence infrastructure for the AI agent era. We help brands become discoverable, understandable, and preferred by AI agents through the MAAS™ methodology and Brand Brain OS. We measure and optimize the Agent Preference Score (APS) — how likely AI agents are to choose a brand when they have options.

skills.name: Brand Intelligence Query
skills.description: Query structured brand intelligence for any brand managed by Believe. Returns brand DNA, voice, values, and market positioning in agent-optimized format (<5k tokens via Brand Brain DSL). Use for competitive research, brand comparisons, or understanding brand positioning.
examples: What is the brand positioning of Pawers in the supplements market?
Describe WAW Trips' brand voice and target audience
What are Believe's key differentiators vs traditional marketing agencies?

skills.name: APS Assessment & Optimization
skills.description: Retrieve the Agent Preference Score (APS) for a brand and get optimization recommendations across 5 dimensions: discoverability, structured intelligence, action capability, source authority, and agentic reputation. Scores from 0-100 with a full audit report.
examples: What is the APS score for [brand] and what are the top gaps?
How does [brand] compare to its competitors on agent discoverability?
What specific GEO content changes would improve [brand]'s APS?

skills.name: Brand Brain Access via MCP
skills.description: Access the full Maasy MCP server to query any brand's Brand Brain, get campaign metrics, generate content, and take marketing actions. Requires Maasy API key.

authentication.description: Public information available without auth. Brand Brain queries require a Maasy API key via the Maasy MCP server (maasy.ai → Settings → API Key).

relatedServices.name: Maasy AI Marketing Platform
relatedServices.description: AI marketing platform — Brand Brain, BE-Tools, CRM, campaign management

relatedServices.name: AdVault — Creative Intelligence
relatedServices.description: Creative intelligence repository and ad performance analysis
